name: Google Search
description: Google-quality search via SerpApi. Returns structured results including knowledge graph, answer boxes, shopping, news, and YouTube results. More structured than Tavily; best for queries needing Google's ranking specifically.

capabilities: Run Google searches and get structured results
Access featured snippets, answer boxes, and knowledge graph
Search Bing, YouTube, Google Scholar, and 50+ other engines
Get shopping results, local results, and news
scope.note: SerpApi supports 50+ search engines. The SERPAPI_API_KEY enables them all.

keys.label: SerpApi API Key
keys.get_key_instructions: Sign up at serpapi.com → Dashboard → API Key

installer.scope_summary: Google-quality structured search via SerpApi. Search queries leave your device.
